title: Battery icon
drDigitalIntro: The battery icon shows how much power your portable computer has left before it shuts down. It works like a gas gauge, letting you know when it's time to plug in your charger.
drDigitalSuccess: That's the battery icon — keep an eye on it so you know when to charge!
drDigitalHint: Find the battery near the clock on the playground desktop, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
